name: DYOE Agent Tools
description: Pay-per-call trust, due-diligence, commerce & data tools for AI agents, settled in USDC on Base via x402 — including the human-verified Guardian approval layer (a real person signs off on high-stakes agent actions).

environmentVariables.name: WALLET_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional. Private key of a FUNDED, LOW-BALANCE Base burner wallet (holds USDC). Each tool call spends USDC via x402. Never use your primary wallet; the key stays local. Leave unset for free PREVIEW mode.
